stemHtml: An aircraft departs from a waypoint at 1013 UTC with a heading of 068°T. The pilot is planning to travel towards an aerodrome fixpoint which is 28 NM away and then continue to the next waypoint for another 63 NM. The aircraft arrives 5 NM left of the aerodrome fixpoint at 1025 UTC. In order to arrive at the next waypoint on track the pilot should follow a heading of (i) _____ and the ETA at the next waypoint is (ii) _____ UTC.
